# r2-rocker partition table — 8 MB flash: # Layout for ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1-N8R8 (8 MB flash). Set up from Phase 0.5
# onward so that no re-flash of a different partition table is needed
# OTA slots are 3 MB each — plenty of headroom for a full esp-idf-svc
# firmware (BLE + WiFi + NimBLE + R2 stack ≈ 2–3 MB). The remaining
# 1.875 MB `storage` partition is reserved for non-volatile local data
